data.description: China Vanke Wins Approval for Revised Plan to Extend Yuan Bond China Vanke secured creditor approval to extend repayment on a yuan bond, easing near-term default risk. More than 92% of holders backing the revised plan agreed after the developer added an upfront cash payment.

data.title: Office Properties Income Trust announces 2025 dividend allocations: $0.01 per share ordinary income, record date 01/27/25.
data.description: In Newton, Massachusetts, Office Properties Income Trust (OPI) released details on the dividend allocations for 2025 income tax reporting. The breakdown per OPI Common Share is as follows: Total Unrecaptured Section 897 Dividends - $0.01, Record Dates 01/27/25, Paid/Payable Dates 02/20/25. There are no allocations for Ordinary Income, 199A Dividends, Qualified Dividends, Capital Gain, Section 1250 Gain, or Capital Gain Distribution. This information is crucial for shareholders and investors for tax purposes.
Historic EU-India trade pact near completion, according to Ursula von der Leyen.
Resolution on extending grace period for redeemed “21 Vanke 02” bonds not approved, says China Vanke.
KeyCorp reports Q4 earnings above expectations on strong interest income growth.

data.title: NSG partners with Copyright Alliance to sponsor free webinar on AI and IP, hosted by National Press Foundation.
data.description: A webinar will be presented by the National Press Foundation, centered on legal matters in the field. The event is scheduled for January 20, 2026, in New York. The Next Solutions Group (NSG), a corporate reputation consultancy, has collaborated with the Copyright Alliance to sponsor the series. The webinar is open to all and aims to shed light on the intersection of various legal aspects.

data.title: ChooChoo, an AI reading toy showcased at CES 2026, promotes early childhood language development, gaining media attention.
data.description: In Las Vegas on January 20, 2026, the CES® 2026 event showcased ChooChoo, an interactive reading companion fueled by AI technology. This innovative product aims to aid in early childhood language development and garnered significant interest for its evidence-based method of boosting children's learning abilities.

data.title: Tom Lee from Fundstrat predicts a tough 2026 beginning before a late-year recovery, expecting Bitcoin to reach a new peak.
data.description: Tom Lee, the chairman of Ethereum treasury firm BitMine and a prominent figure at Fundstrat, predicts that Bitcoin will reach a new peak before the end of the year.
Israeli leader Netanyahu denies any place for Turkish or Qatari forces in Gaza amid rejection of US “Board of Peace.”

data.title: Copperhead Resources Inc. approved a Change of Business to focus on subsea critical mineral exploration as Deep Sea Minerals Corp. (CSE: CUH) (OTCPK: CUHRF) (FSE: X45), approved by majority shareholders and the Canadian Securities Exchange.
data.description: Vancouver, British Columbia - On January 20, 2026, Copperhead Resources Inc. confirmed its transition to Deep Sea Minerals Corp. (CSE: CUH) (OTCPK: CUHRF) (FSE: X45) following shareholder approval received after the January 19, 2026, announcement. The Company's new focus on subsea critical mineral exploration has been well received by the majority of shareholders, with the Name Change also being endorsed. Additionally, the Canadian Securities Exchange has granted its final approval for the Change of Business, marking a significant milestone for Deep Sea Minerals Corp.

data.title: Refined Energy Corp. to launch charity flow-through private placement for fundraising.
data.description: A recent report reveals that the global population has reached 7.9 billion people, with over 50% of the world residing in urban areas. The study also indicates that around 2.2 billion individuals are overweight or obese, while over 690 million suffer from hunger or undernourishment. Additionally, the research highlights that nearly 1.1 billion people lack access to clean drinking water, and around 2.3 billion do not have basic sanitation services. These statistics emphasize the ongoing challenges faced by a significant portion of the world's population in terms of health, nutrition, and basic living conditions.

data.title: Key Tronic Corp (Nasdaq: KTCC) will report Q2 fiscal 2026 results on Feb 3, 2026 after market close.
data.description: Spokane Valley, Washington - Key Tronic Corporation (Nasdaq: KTCC) disclosed its intention to release the second-quarter fiscal 2026 results on February 3, 2026, after the market closes.

data.title: Teck announces 2025 production & sales update, affirms outlook; gives annual production volumes & guidance for 2026-2028.
data.description: Teck Resources Limited (TSX: TECK.A and TECK.B, NYSE: TECK) based in Vancouver, British Columbia, shared key unaudited data today. In the fourth quarter of 2025, the company reported its production and sales volumes, along with favorable settlement pricing adjustments. They also disclosed the annual production volumes for 2025. Looking ahead, Teck reaffirmed the production and unit cost guidance provided earlier for the years 2026 to 2028 for sites under its operation.
